S.FORM: Carl XVI Gustaf I 1946 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Carl XVI Gustaf, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Sweden anini i ci Carl XVI Gustaf, patirengan a romi'ad i 1973 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 15 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô

S.FORM: Carl XVI Gustaf I 1946 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 30 a romi'ad masofoc ci Carl XVI Gustaf, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Sweden anini i ci Carl XVI Gustaf, patirengan a romi'ad i 1973 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 15 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
